documentation: Claude is a family of foundational AI models built by Anthropic, focused on safety, large context windows (up to 200k tokens), and advanced reasoning capabilities. Models include Haiku, Sonnet, and Opus.
pricing: Claude 3.5 Sonnet is $3/M input tokens and $15/M output tokens via API. Claude Pro web interface is $20/month.
release_notes: Claude 3.5 Sonnet release sets new industry benchmarks for coding, vision, and speed at a mid-tier price point.
